backstory.original: Forged to be the jailer for a prison filled with eldritch horrors in a faraway land, Warden became corrupted by the monstrosities they sought to keep locked away. Now they journey at the behest of an otherworldly master, seeking souls for the insatiable Dark Hunger to corrupt and feast upon.
backstory.display: 在遥远之地一个充斥着奥术恐怖的监狱里，守望者被锻造成一名狱卒，最终却被他们试图锁住的怪兽所腐蚀。现在，他们在另一个世界主人的指示下开始旅行，为贪得无厌的黑暗渴望寻找灵魂，使灵魂堕落供黑暗渴望所享用。

description.original: Warden leaps to a random enemy and attacks them with their armblade.
description.display: 守望者跳向一名随机敌人，用臂刃发动攻击。

description.original: Warden opens a rift to the void, pulling all enemies and specters to one spot on the screen.
description.display: 守望者打开一条虚空裂隙，将所有敌人和幽灵拉至屏幕上的某一点。

longDescription.original: Warden opens a rift to the void, damaging and momentarily stunning all enemies and pulling them and all active specters to a position slightly in front of the formation.
longDescription.display: 守望者打开一条虚空裂隙，对所有敌人造成伤害和短暂眩晕，并将他们和所有激活的幽灵拉扯至阵型稍前方处的一个位置。

conditions.desc: Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 10 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 6 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 8 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 7 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 4 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 3 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy can have up to 5 Hex stacks at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%

Warden curses their target enemy before attacking it, applying 1 stack of Hex. Enemies take $(not_buffed amount)% more damage for each Hex stack afflicting them, stacking multiplicatively. Initially, each enemy can only have 1 Hex stack at a time.^Post stack Hex bonus: $amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 10 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 6 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 8 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 7 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 4 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 3 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每个敌人同时可以附带最多 5 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%
守望者在攻击前诅咒自己的目标敌人，对其施加 1 层“巫术”。每层“巫术”堆叠均使受影响敌人受到的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。一开始，每个敌人只能同时附带 1 层“巫术”。^堆叠后“巫术”加成：$amount%

tipText.original: Warden Hexes all enemies that they attack, causing them to take extra damage.
tipText.display: 守望者对攻击的所有敌人施加巫术，使其受到额外伤害。

description.desc: Enemies that die while cursed by Warden spawn Accursed Specters, which increase the damage taken by nearby enemies by $amount%
敌人在受到守望者的“诅咒幽灵”诅咒时死亡，将使附近敌人受到的伤害提高 $amount%
The maximum number of Accursed Specters that can be active at once is equal to the number of Evil aligned Champions in the formation.
同时可激活的“诅咒幽灵”最大数量等同于阵型中邪恶阵营勇士的数量。

specializationDescription.original: Warden works with the evil Champions in the formation to spawn more Accursed Specters at once.
specializationDescription.display: 守望者与阵型中的邪恶勇士合作，同时刷新更多诅咒幽灵。

description.desc: The maximum number of Accursed Specters that can be active at once is equal to the number of Champions with a DEX score of 16 or higher in the formation.
同时可激活的“诅咒幽灵”最大数量等同于阵型中敏捷属性值大于等于 16 的勇士数量。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Warden works with the most agile Champions in the formation to spawn more Accursed Specters at once.
specializationDescription.display: 守望者与阵型中最敏捷的勇士合作，同时刷新更多诅咒幽灵。

description.desc: The maximum number of Accursed Specters that can be active at once is equal to the number of Champions with Charisma as their highest ability score in the formation.
同时可激活的“诅咒幽灵”最大数量等同于阵型中最高属性值为魅力的勇士数量。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks

specializationDescription.original: Warden works with the most charismatic Champions in the formation to spawn more Accursed Specters at once.
specializationDescription.display: 守望者与阵型中最具魅力的勇士合作，同时刷新更多诅咒幽灵。

description.desc: When Warden attacks, all active Accursed Specters rush toward the location of their target prior to them hitting it.
守望者攻击时，所有激活的“诅咒幽灵”都会在击中目标之前冲向目标所在的位置。
Hex can now stack up to 4 times on each enemy.
每个敌人现在最多可以堆叠 4 层“巫术”。

tipText.original: Hex can stack up to 4 times. The more Warden attacks, the more damage enemies take.
tipText.display: 巫术最多可以叠加 4 次。守望者攻击的次数越多，敌人受到的伤害越大。

description.desc: Whenever a Champion kills an enemy near an Accursed Specter, the Specter reacts violently, applying $amount Hex stack to all enemies in its radius.
每当勇士击杀“诅咒幽灵”附近的敌人时，幽灵就会做出激烈反应，对其范围内的所有敌人施加 $amount 层“巫术”。

Warden's attacks also deal area damage in a small radius around them equal to $amount% times the highest number of active Hex stacks that there has been in the current area. This effect does not apply any additional Hex stacks.
守望者的攻击还会在其周围造成小范围的范围伤害，数值相当于 $amount% 乘以当前区域内已激活的最高“巫术”堆叠层数。此效果不施加任何额外的巫术层数。

description.original: I am a creature of nightmares, or so I'm told.
description.display: 我是一个梦魇生物，别人是这么跟我说的。

description.original: If you get that close you won't survive it.
description.display: 如果你靠得那么近，可能会死。

description.original: I am trained in the ways of combat.
description.display: 我接受过各种战斗训练。

description.original: I am here to observe.
description.display: 我来这里是为了观察。

description.original: If need be, I shall lead you to the void.
description.display: 如果需要，我可以带你前往虚空。

description.original: The whispers echo through my very being.
description.display: 低语在我的内心回响。

description.original: My hex will be carved into your mind.
description.display: 我的巫术将刻入你的心灵。

description.original: This land is... curious.
description.display: 这片土地......很奇怪。

description.original: The minions of the void are waiting for you.
description.display: 空虚的仆从正等待着你。

description.original: How can you stop what you cannot comprehend?
description.display: 你要如何阻挡无法理解的事物？

description.original: The words I utter have existed since time itself.
description.display: 我口中的话语与时间同样古老。

effects.description: Increases the number of Hex stacks applied by Master of Hexes by $amount (additively).

description.original: Engulf my enemies. Break them down.
description.display: 吞噬我的敌人。把他们大卸八块。

description.original: One touch of these specters will curse your soul for eternity.
description.display: 这些幽灵的轻触将永远诅咒你的灵魂。

effects.description: Increases the max number of Accursed Specters by $amount

description.original: These are spirits of time itself.
description.display: 这些都是时间本身的幽灵。

effects.description: Increases the max number of Accursed Specters by $amount

description.original: My hex will follow you across the planes.
description.display: 我的巫术会穿梭位面追踪你。

effects.description: Increases monsters' max number of Hex Stacks by $amount

description.original: There is no escape from this.
description.display: 这是无法逃避的。

effects.description: Increases monsters' max number of Hex Stacks by $amount

description.original: Is this form not satisfactory?
description.display: 对这个形态不满意吗？

description.original: I persist through many catastrophes.
description.display: 在诸多灾难当中，我亦屹立不倒。

description.original: Follow me, or suffer my wrath.
description.display: 跟随我，否则你将承受我的怒火。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Forged to be the jailer for a prison filled with eldritch horrors in a faraway land, Warden became corrupted by the monstrosities they sought to keep locked away. Now they journey at the behest of an otherworldly master, seeking souls for the insatiable Dark Hunger to corrupt and feast upon.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Warden debuffs enemies that they attack, who then spread the debuff to other enemies when they're killed.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 在遥远之地一个充斥着奥术恐怖的监狱里，守望者被锻造成一名狱卒，最终却被他们试图锁住的怪兽所腐蚀。现在，他们在另一个世界主人的指示下开始旅行，为贪得无厌的黑暗渴望寻找灵魂，使灵魂堕落供黑暗渴望所享用。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 守望者会对其攻击的敌人造成减益效果，并且敌人被击杀后会将该减益效果传播给其他敌人。

display.name: 巫术武器臂刃

original.name: Hunger of Hadar
original.description: Warden opens a rift to the void, pulling all enemies and specters to one spot on the screen.
